column5: image_prompt
Spicy crispy fried chicken thigh burger with mayo and lettuce in a sesame bun.
Double beef patty cheeseburger with two melted cheese slices in a sesame bun.
Fish fillet burger with tartar sauce and a slice of cheese in a soft bun.
Plant-based veggie patty burger with lettuce and tomato in a bun.
A portion of golden crispy french fries.
Nine golden chicken nuggets with a small cup of curry dipping sauce.
A single golden crispy oval hash brown patty.
A soft-serve vanilla ice cream sundae in a cup with chocolate sauce.
A fried apple pie pastry pocket, golden and crispy.
A Milo chocolate-malt milkshake in a cup.
Hainanese chicken rice — slices of poached white chicken on a plate with fragrant oily rice and cucumber, small dishes of chilli and dark soy sauce.
Nasi lemak — coconut rice on a banana leaf with red sambal, fried anchovies, roasted peanuts, a fried egg and cucumber slices.
Laksa — thick rice noodles in a rich orange coconut curry gravy, topped with prawns, cockles, tau pok and fishcake, garnished with laksa leaf.
Char kway teow — stir-fried flat rice noodles in dark soy sauce with prawns, Chinese sausage, bean sprouts, egg and cockles, smoky wok-fried.
Singapore Hokkien mee — yellow noodles and rice vermicelli braised in prawn stock with prawns, squid and egg, a side of sambal chilli and lime.
Wanton mee — dry egg noodles with slices of char siu barbecue pork, wanton dumplings and leafy greens, tossed in chilli sauce.
Beef hor fun — silky wide flat rice noodles in a glossy brown gravy with tender beef slices and green vegetables.
Sambal stingray — a grilled stingray wing on a banana leaf topped with red sambal chilli paste, with lime and sliced onion.
Black fried carrot cake — cubes of white radish cake stir-fried with dark sweet soy sauce, egg and spring onion, on a plate.
Chicken satay — grilled chicken skewers with char marks, a bowl of peanut sauce, ketupat rice cakes and cucumber-onion.
Kaya toast set — toasted bread with kaya coconut jam and a slab of butter, two soft-boiled eggs in a saucer, and a cup of kopi.
Kopi — a cup of strong dark Nanyang coffee with condensed milk in a traditional ceramic coffee cup.
Teh tarik — pulled milk tea with a frothy top, in a clear glass cup.
Teh C — tea with evaporated milk, warm caramel colour, in a clear glass.
Milo dinosaur — iced Milo chocolate drink topped with a thick mound of undissolved Milo powder, in a tall glass.
Sugarcane juice — a glass of fresh green-tinged sugarcane juice with ice and a slice of lime.
Iced lime juice — a tall glass of pale green iced lime juice with lime slices and ice.
Roti prata kosong — plain crispy golden flaky flatbread with a small bowl of curry.
Egg prata — flaky golden flatbread folded around egg, with a bowl of curry.
Coin prata — a pile of small thick coin-shaped mini pratas, golden and crispy, with curry dip.
Cheese prata — flaky prata folded with melted cheese oozing out, golden and crispy.
Prata bomb — a thick round ball-shaped prata glazed with condensed milk and dusted with sugar.
Tissue prata — a tall crispy cone-shaped paper-thin prata dusted with sugar, towering on a plate.
Chicken murtabak — a thick pan-fried stuffed flatbread filled with minced chicken and egg, cut into squares, with curry.
Masala thosai — a large crispy golden rolled fermented crepe with spiced potato filling, sides of chutney and sambar.
Maggi goreng — fried instant noodles with egg, vegetables and chilli, garnished, on a plate.
Teh halia — frothy ginger milk tea in a glass.
Air bandung — a bright pink rose-syrup milk drink with ice in a tall glass.
Milo godzilla — iced Milo drink topped with Milo powder and a scoop of vanilla ice cream, in a tall glass.
Ice kacang — a mountain of shaved ice drizzled with rainbow-coloured syrups over red beans, jelly and corn, with condensed milk.
Chendol — shaved ice with green rice-flour jelly strands, coconut milk and dark gula melaka palm sugar syrup, in a bowl.
Mango sago pomelo — a creamy mango dessert with sago pearls and pomelo bits, topped with mango cubes, in a glass.
Ice cream potong sandwich — a brick of colourful ice cream between slices of rainbow bread.
Tang yuan — glutinous rice balls in a clear warm ginger soup in a bowl.
Tau huay — silky soft beancurd pudding in a bowl with light sweet syrup.
Bubur cha cha — a colourful dessert of sweet potato and yam cubes with sago in warm coconut milk, in a bowl.
Pulut hitam — black glutinous rice porridge topped with a swirl of coconut cream, in a bowl.
Cheng tng — a clear sweet dessert soup with longan, barley and white fungus, in a bowl.

Singapore chilli crab — a whole mud crab coated in glossy red-orange sweet-and-spicy tomato-chilli gravy with egg ribbons and spring onion, with golden fried mantou buns on the side, on a white plate.
Singapore black pepper crab — a whole crab coated in a dark, dry, glossy black pepper sauce with visible cracked pepper and curry leaves, on a plate.
Cereal butter prawns — fried prawns tossed in golden buttery cereal crumbs with fried curry leaves and sliced red chilli, piled on a plate.
Sambal kangkong — stir-fried water spinach in glossy red sambal chilli sauce, wok-fried, on a plate.
Salted egg yolk chicken — crispy chicken pieces coated in creamy golden salted-egg-yolk sauce with curry leaves and sliced chilli, on a plate.
Bak chor mee — dry springy egg noodles topped with minced pork, sliced pork, pork liver, fried lard bits and red chilli sauce, a small bowl of soup beside it.
Fishball mee pok — dry flat egg noodles with white bouncy fishballs, minced pork and red chilli sauce, garnished with chopped spring onion.
Lor mee — thick yellow noodles in a thick glossy dark-brown starchy gravy, topped with sliced fishcake, braised egg and ngoh hiang, with red chilli and minced garlic.
Bak kut teh — clear peppery pork-rib soup in a bowl with meaty pork ribs, a side of youtiao dough fritters and white rice, dark soy sauce with sliced chilli.
Sliced fish bee hoon soup — milky white fish broth with slices of fish, thin rice vermicelli, tomato and spring onion in a bowl.
Ayam penyet — smashed crispy fried chicken on white rice with a mound of red sambal, fried tofu and tempeh, and cucumber slices, on a plate.
Mutton briyani — fragrant yellow-orange basmati rice with spiced mutton pieces, a side of achar pickle and curry, on a plate.
Mee rebus — yellow noodles in a thick sweet-savoury brown potato gravy, topped with sliced boiled egg, green chilli, fried tofu, bean sprouts and a lime wedge.
Mee siam — thin rice vermicelli in a tangy orange spicy-sour gravy, topped with sliced boiled egg, fried tofu, chives and lime.
Roti john — halved French baguette topped with a minced-mutton omelette, griddled golden, drizzled with chilli sauce and mayo.
